Row.SQL: SELECT CommemorationTypes.CommemorationType as PageId, "COMMEMORATIONS" as PageGroupId, "HD_COMMEMORATION" as PageLayoutId, CommemorationTypes.CategoryDescription, null as Tooltip, Eras.ChronologyIndex as SortIndex FROM CommemorationTypes INNER JOIN Eras ON CommemorationTypes.MinimumGameEra = Eras.EraType ORDER BY Eras.ChronologyIndex
SELECT AncientCommemorationType as PageId, "CHINA_COMMEMORATIONS" as PageGroupId, "HD_CHINA_COMMEMORATION" as PageLayoutId, Name, null as Tooltip, SortIndex FROM China_AncientCommemorationTypes_HD

SELECT BuildingType as PageId, PreReqDistrict as PageGroupId, "Building" as PageLayoutId, Name, null as Tooltip, Cost FROM Buildings Where IsWonder = 0 AND InternalOnly = 0 AND BuildingType NOT LIKE "BUILDING_CITY_POLICY_%"
SELECT BuildingType as PageId, "CITY_POLICIES" as PageGroupId, "Building" as PageLayoutId, Name, null as Tooltip FROM Buildings WHERE BuildingType LIKE "BUILDING_CITY_POLICY_%"

SELECT GreatPersonIndividualType as PageId, GreatPersonClassType as PageGroupId, "GreatPerson" as PageLayoutId, GreatPersonIndividuals.Name, null as Tooltip, Eras.ChronologyIndex as SortIndex FROM GreatPersonIndividuals INNER JOIN Eras ON GreatPersonIndividuals.EraType = Eras.EraType ORDER BY Eras.ChronologyIndex
SELECT DistrictType as PageId, "COMMON_DISTRICTS" as PageGroupId, "District" as PageLayoutId, Name, null as Tooltip FROM Districts where InternalOnly = 0 and TraitType is null
SELECT DistrictType as PageId, "UNIQUE_DISTRICTS" as PageGroupId, "District" as PageLayoutId, Name, null as Tooltip FROM Districts where InternalOnly = 0 and TraitType is not null

SELECT HD_Improvement_Classification.ImprovementType as PageId, HD_Improvement_Classification.ImprovementClassificationType as PageGroupId, "Improvement" as PageLayoutId, Improvements.Name, null as Tooltip FROM HD_Improvement_Classification INNER JOIN Improvements ON HD_Improvement_Classification.ImprovementType = Improvements.ImprovementType
SELECT RouteType as PageId, "Routes" as PageGroupId, "Route" as PageLayoutId, Name, null as Tooltip, PlacementValue as SortIndex FROM Routes

SELECT HD_Civilopedia_Resource_Groups.ResourceType as PageId, HD_Civilopedia_Resource_Groups.PageGroupId, "Resource" as PageLayoutId, "[ICON_" || HD_Civilopedia_Resource_Groups.ResourceType || "] {" || Resources.Name || "}" as Name, null as Tooltip FROM HD_Civilopedia_Resource_Groups INNER JOIN Resources ON HD_Civilopedia_Resource_Groups.ResourceType = Resources.ResourceType

SELECT Buildings.BuildingType as PageId, Technologies.EraType as PageGroupId, "Building" as PageLayoutId, Buildings.Name, null as Tooltip, Buildings.Cost FROM Buildings INNER JOIN Technologies ON Buildings.PrereqTech = Technologies.TechnologyType Where Buildings.IsWonder = 1 AND Buildings.InternalOnly = 0 AND Buildings.MaxWorldInstances = 1

SELECT Buildings.BuildingType as PageId, Civics.EraType as PageGroupId, "Building" as PageLayoutId, Buildings.Name, null as Tooltip, Buildings.Cost FROM Buildings INNER JOIN Civics ON Buildings.PrereqCivic = Civics.CivicType Where Buildings.IsWonder = 1 AND Buildings.InternalOnly = 0 AND Buildings.MaxWorldInstances = 1

SELECT BuildingType as PageId, "ERA_ANCIENT" as PageGroupId, "Building" as PageLayoutId, Name, null as Tooltip, Cost FROM Buildings WHERE PrereqTech is NULL and PrereqCivic is NULL and IsWonder = 1 AND Buildings.InternalOnly = 0 AND Buildings.MaxWorldInstances = 1

SELECT BuildingType as PageId, "NATIONAL_WONDERS" as PageGroupId, "Building" as PageLayoutId, Name, null as Tooltip, Cost FROM Buildings Where IsWonder = 1 AND InternalOnly = 0 AND MaxPlayerInstances = 1
SELECT ProjectType as PageId, "Projects" as PageGroupId, "Project" as PageLayoutId, ShortName as Name, null as Tooltip FROM Projects

SELECT UnitType as PageId, "CIVILIAN_UNITS" as PageGroupId, "Unit" as PageLayoutId, Name, null as Tooltip, Cost FROM Units where FormationClass = "FORMATION_CLASS_CIVILIAN" and UnitType not in (SELECT UnitType from GreatPersonClasses) and PromotionClass is Null and ReligiousStrength = 0
SELECT UnitType as PageId, "RELIGIOUS_UNITS" as PageGroupId, "Unit" as PageLayoutId, Name, null as Tooltip, Cost FROM Units where ReligiousStrength != 0
SELECT UnitType as PageId, "GREAT_PERSON_UNITS" as PageGroupId, "Unit" as PageLayoutId, Name, null as Tooltip, Cost FROM Units where UnitType in (SELECT UnitType from GreatPersonClasses)

SELECT UnitType as PageId, PromotionClass as PageGroupId, "Unit" as PageLayoutId, Name, null as Tooltip, Cost FROM Units where PromotionClass is not Null and PromotionClass not in ("PROMOTION_CLASS_APOSTLE", "PROMOTION_CLASS_INQUISITOR")

SELECT UnitType as PageId, "OTHER_UNITS" as PageGroupId, "Unit" as PageLayoutId, Name, null as Tooltip, Cost FROM Units where FormationClass != "FORMATION_CLASS_CIVILIAN" and ReligiousStrength = 0 and PromotionClass is Null and UnitType not in (SELECT UnitType from GreatPersonClasses)

SELECT CivilizationType as PageId, CivilizationType as PageGroupId, "Civilization" as PageLayoutId, Name, null as Tooltip FROM Civilizations where StartingCivilizationLevelType = "CIVILIZATION_LEVEL_FULL_CIV"

SELECT distinct Leaders.LeaderType AS PageId, Civilizations.CivilizationType AS PageGroupId, "Leader" AS PageLayoutId, Leaders.Name, null AS Tooltip, "LOC_PEDIA_LEADERS_PAGE" as TextKeyPrefix FROM Leaders INNER JOIN CivilizationLeaders on CivilizationLeaders.LeaderType = Leaders.LeaderType INNER JOIN Civilizations ON CivilizationLeaders.CivilizationType = Civilizations.CivilizationType WHERE Civilizations.StartingCivilizationLevelType = "CIVILIZATION_LEVEL_FULL_CIV"
SELECT EraType as PageGroupId, "{LOC_PEDIA_WONDERS_PAGEGROUP_WONDERS_NAME} {" || Name|| "}" as Name, Null as Tooltip, 0 as VisibleIfEmpty, ChronologyIndex from Eras

SELECT PromotionClassType as PageGroupId, Name, null as Tooltip, 1 as VisibleIfEmpty, 20 as SortIndex from UnitPromotionClasses WHERE PromotionClassType not in ("PROMOTION_CLASS_APOSTLE", "PROMOTION_CLASS_INQUISITOR")
SELECT CivilizationType as PageGroupId, Name, null as Tooltip FROM Civilizations where StartingCivilizationLevelType = "CIVILIZATION_LEVEL_FULL_CIV"
SELECT ImprovementClassificationType as PageGroupId, Name, null as Tooltip, SortIndex FROM HD_ImprovementClassificationTypes
